reviews.comment:
ACA. La Falda, Córdoba.
Obra del Arq. Antonio Vilar.
Es el fruto de un convenio que firmó el ACA  con la empresa Nacional de Hidrocarburos YPF que ya en la década del '30 había propuesto promocionarse. Para ello ofreció al ACA la construcción de estaciones de servicio con la venta exclusiva del producto de la petrolera Nacional.
Todas las estaciones las realizaría un mismo grupo, por lo que en el año 1937 se llama a concurso. El primer premio fue para el Ing. Antonio Vilar.

(Translated by Google)
ACA. La Falda, Córdoba.
Designed by architect Antonio Vilar.

This project resulted from an agreement signed between the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) and the National Hydrocarbons Company (YPF), which had already proposed promoting itself in the 1930s. To this end, YPF offered the ACA the construction of service stations exclusively selling YPF's products.
All the stations would be built by the same group, so a competition was held in 1937. The first prize was awarded to engineer Antonio Vilar.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s0eFgyUldXVWc1VWxoemEwSTVNVkJXYTJ4NVJVRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños limpios. La atencion muy lenta. Llegamos 12:45 para almorzar y seguir camino hacia Rosario. Pedimos un menu del dia que consistia en fideos sin salsa y 2 hamburguesas. La comida  recien la enttegaron a las 13:35 hs

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were clean. The service was very slow. We arrived at 12:45 for lunch before continuing on to Rosario. We ordered a set menu consisting of noodles without sauce and two hamburgers. The food wasn't delivered until 1:35 PM.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25OcmVEVTBaVkJ2YkRRM1RHMVJaRTA1U2xaUlFrRRAB
